attributes.title: [etcd OTel] Overview
attributes.description: Overview of etcd cluster health: Raft consensus, storage saturation, proposal rates, error indicators, and resource usage.

This dashboard provides an overview of etcd cluster health:
- Raft consensus status (leader, proposals)
- Storage saturation (DB size vs quota)
- Error indicators (failed proposals, heartbeat failures)
- Resource usage (memory, file descriptors, goroutines)
